emotional_tone: Calm, trustworthy, safe, and approachable. Escaping the cold, clinical tech-bro aesthetic.
design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation: Combine modern messaging app patterns (WhatsApp) with organic botanical color warmth.
Emotion First: The UI must lower patient anxiety. Soft rounded edges, warm tones, and readable typography.
Content is King: The AI chat is the hero. Keep distractions minimal.
Negative Space: Generous padding around chat bubbles and dashboard cards to provide breathing room.
Contrast: Use deep forest greens for critical actions against warm bone-white backgrounds.

rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Body text must use relaxed line height.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical clinical apps.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Max-width of 3xl (48rem) for the chat interface to maintain readability.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Use p-6 or p-8 for dashboard cards.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Control Room Grid for the dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 with gap-6. Flat rectangles, no heavy box shadows.
spacing_and_layout.chat_layout: WhatsApp-style but elevated. AI bubbles left, User bubbles right. Max bubble width 80%.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary-hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-primary rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-chat_ai transition-colors
buttons.sos: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(220,38,38,0.5)] animate-pulse hover:bg-red-700

cards.note: Avoid default Shadcn Card shadow. Use 1px subtle border.

inputs.style: bg-white border border-border rounded-full px-6 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sage focus:border-transparent transition-all
inputs.chat_input: flex-1 bg-chat_ai border-none rounded-full px-6 py-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sage

surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border sticky top-0 z-50

motion.chat_message: Animate new messages entering from bottom with slight fade-in (Framer Motion).
motion.sos_alert: Pulsing red glow for High Severity warnings.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, rounded caps. Use primary or secondary colors.

image_urls.description: Abstract patterned texture with organic shapes for landing page background.
Confident South Asian male doctor in white coat with stethoscope, for trust building in about/landing section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sage on all interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='chat-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Outfit and Manrope fonts from Google Fonts via CSS import.
Set up Tailwind config with the custom color palette provided above.
Implement the Chat UI using a WhatsApp-style message layout but with the provided curved bubble radius.
Use Lucide icons for UI actions (send, menu, map, SOS).
For the Maps integration, overlay it cleanly within a border-border rounded-2xl container without heavy shadows.
Ensure the SOS button pulses and is highly visible when the AI returns 'High' severity.
Apply backdrop-blur-xl to the sticky top navigation header.
Do not use generic blue/teal colors. Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette.
